name: Mama Leone's Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all crust ingredients and roll out to a 10-inch circle. Fit into the bottom of a 10-inch greased springform pan.
2. Bake at 300°F for 15 minutes, then cool the crust.
3. Spread drained pineapple evenly over the crust.
4. Pour in the filling: Beat together cheese, flour, salt, vanilla, lemon rind, and beaten eggs until well combined.
5. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat.
6. Fold the meringue into the filling mixture gently.
7. Pour the batter into the pan.
8. Place the cheesecake pan in a larger pot of simmering water (the water should come up about 2 inches on the sides of the pan). This is known as a water bath.
9. Return to 300°F oven and bake for 45 minutes or until set.
10. Allow the cheesecake to cool completely in the pan, then refrigerate overnight.
